mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cat_mesh_entry_term ( id, descriptor_id, term_ui, concept_ui, term, lexical_tag, is_print_flag, record_preferred, is_permuted_term, is_concept_preferred, abbreviation, sort_version, entry_version, term_note, date_created, thesaurus_ids, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.descriptorId}, #{item.termUi}, #{item.conceptUi}, #{item.term}, #{item.lexicalTag}, #{item.isPrintFlag}, #{item.recordPreferred}, #{item.isPermutedTerm}, #{item.isConceptPreferred}, #{item.abbreviation}, #{item.sortVersion}, #{item.entryVersion}, #{item.termNote}, #{item.dateCreated}, #{item.thesaurusIds, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, 0, NOW(6), NOW(6), 0 )
